name: Lemony Anise Hyssop Tea Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour the bread or loaf pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Cream butter with sugar until fluffy in a separate bowl.
5. Add lemon rind, chopped flowers, and eggs; beat mixture just until thoroughly combined.
6. Stir in lemon juice. Mix in the dry ingredients and nuts until blended.
7. Spoon batter into prepared pan.
8. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes.
9. Cool on rack.
